reviews.review_msg: By the end of that term, our course ended up to have only 4 people registered; and professor gave 4 different grades to us; it was like ranking the students. I don't know if there were such huge differences to reflect this harsh ranking.
He is absolutely very knowledgeable and cares a lot about the students. On the other hand, the way he presents the lectures is kind of messy and not very decent.
